sections.title: Dear Ana
content: This is not a website.

This is simply something
I wanted to write for you.

sections.title: When We Met
content:
I still remember the first time
I saw you.

Nothing dramatic happened.
No music. No sudden clarity.

Just a quiet knowing
that something had shifted.

sections.title: What I Felt
content: It was not loud.

It was soft.
Steady.
Certain.

Like coming home
to a place I had never been.

sections.title: What I Admire
content:
The way you listen
as if every word matters.

The patience in your silence.
The kindness in how you move
through the world.

You make ordinary moments
feel deliberate.

sections.title: The Little Things
content:
Your laugh when you try not to.
The way you tilt your head
when you're thinking.

How you remember details
most people forget.

These are the things
I carry with me.

sections.title: How I've Changed
content:
Since you appeared,
I have become quieter
in the best way.

More present.
More careful with what I say.
More grateful for what stays.

You made room in me
I did not know was empty.

sections.title: What I Imagine
content:
Mornings without hurry.
Evenings that stretch
just because we want them to.

A life built not from grand gestures,
but from choosing each other
again and again.

I don't need forever tonight.
I only need the courage
to ask for today.

If I had to choose
my favorite place,

it would always be
next to you.
And now...

there is only
one thing left
to ask.

lines:
You just made
me the happiest man
in the world.
